description_long: This is a modern, rectangular shelving unit with a light beige, stone-textured top surface and a black frame. The structure features open shelving on one side, with three visible horizontal shelves supported by angled side panels. The back and two sides are mostly enclosed, with a central vertical panel and a horizontal support bar, giving the unit a sturdy appearance. The open front allows for easy access to the shelves, making it suitable for storing or displaying items. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with clean lines and a contrasting color scheme. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or garages, serving as a utility or display shelf.
description: A modern, black-framed shelving unit with a light beige stone-textured top and open front shelving. It features a minimalist, sturdy design with three shelves and partially enclosed sides.
description_view_0: The open front view reveals three horizontal shelves and angled black side panels, with the light beige top clearly visible.
description_view_1: The back view shows a mostly enclosed surface with a central vertical panel and a horizontal support bar, concealing the shelves.
description_view_2: The opposite side view is similar to the back, with the central panel and support bar visible, but the shelves are less apparent.
description_view_3: This side view mirrors view 1, showing the enclosed back with the vertical and horizontal support elements.
